page: Microsoft Azure F4ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Fadsv7 server family. It runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and features 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor. The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core.

This server configuration includes 472 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses, and it does not feature any graphics processing units.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the F4ads_v7 offers a balanced allocation of dedicated compute resources and memory alongside a substantial local storage allotment. This makes it a viable option for workloads that require local scratch space or moderate database operations without the overhead of GPU acceleration. Appropriate workloads include general-purpose applications, web serving, and small-to-medium database hosting.
description: Microsoft Azure F4ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine within the Fadsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance includes 472 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile provides a stable foundation for general-purpose computing, web serving, and database workloads requiring local disk space.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F4ads_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 472 GB of local storage, designed for general-purpose and database workloads.

tagline: A balanced x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors, moderate memory density, and substantial local storage capacity.
